qa_pairs.question: Why might users encounter access issues when trying to use the ImageNet dataset provided by the Digital Research Alliance of Canada?
qa_pairs.answer: Users might face access issues with the ImageNet dataset because it is provided as an NFS3 mount. These problems can arise if a user belongs to more than 16 groups in Compute Canada (CC).

qa_pairs.question: What is the "Tiny ImageNet" dataset available through the Digital Research Alliance of Canada, and where can it be located?
qa_pairs.answer: The "Tiny ImageNet" dataset is a downsampled and reduced version containing 100,000 images across 200 classes, each downsized to 64x64 pixels. It is located at `/datashare/imagenet/tiny-imagenet-200`.

qa_pairs.question: What content is stored within the `winter21_whole` directory of the ImageNet dataset provided by the Digital Research Alliance of Canada?
qa_pairs.answer: The `winter21_whole` directory contains the Winter 2021 release of the full ImageNet-21k dataset. This version comprises 13,153,500 images divided into 19,167 classes, and it is located at `/datashare/imagenet/winter21_whole`.
